name: linkedin_analytics
description: Get LinkedIn analytics for your profile and posts. Extracts impressions, engagement rates, profile views, and follower growth.

name: linkedin_engage
description: Engage with posts in your LinkedIn feed by liking and commenting. Use to build network engagement and grow your LinkedIn presence.

limit.description: Maximum number of posts to engage with (default: 10)

name: linkedin_ideas
description: Generate content ideas for LinkedIn based on topics or trending themes. Provides high-engagement post formats, hashtag strategies, and content calendars.

topic.description: Topic or industry for content ideas (e.g., 'tech', 'leadership', 'marketing')

name: linkedin_post
description: Post content to LinkedIn. Use this tool to create and publish a new post on LinkedIn. The tool returns step-by-step browser instructions that the agent should execute using the browser tool.

content.description: The post content/text to publish on LinkedIn

image_path.description: Optional: Path to an image file to attach to the post

name: linkedin_schedule
description: Schedule a LinkedIn post for future publication. Use with OpenClaw cron to automate posting at optimal times.

schedule_time.description: When to post (YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM format, UTC)

image_path.description: Optional: Path to an image to attach
